reviews.review_description:
First off, I really like the idea of this game! The hand tracking and scissors, paper, rock mechanic is really novel and cool, especially for a rhythm game! I didn't expect much from this but I try to support smaller developers as much as I can, especially with cool ideas!
Yet playing the game the hand tracking does quite a good job, the implementation does well, and the visuals are clear.
But it can stutter a bit. And I hate AI being used to make games. I also hate that we're now in a time where you have to be wary of it even if it isn't there. And anyone thinking it's a harmless tool to help, it isn't. It is literally a redundant "tool" that was supposed to be used for saving lives and assisting us exploring space, literally for everything except invading our art at a ridiculous level. It's driving up costs, making humans irrelevant, even at small levels. You could say that it's being used to help in struggling times, yet it is literally what is making the struggling times. It isn't a help, it's a parasitic shortcut and soulless implementation. Maybe I'm wrong about it being used, but the voice over definitely sounds it, where it could have been the voice of one of the devs or their friends. Then I worry the music is AI, but I hope not. But the artwork is. It's horrible.
I'm only giving this 3 stars and trying it because I love the idea and I try to support smaller devs, even though I have hardly any money. 
Sorry for the rant, I'm just tired of the times we're living in.
A cool idea, but AI needs to go. Devs, put the real effort in, I believe in you.

Hello! Thinking about asking for a refund, the game is extremely short and the developer is working in other projects, only two updates in 1 year, the gameplay ok but is very basic with two modes with only one little difference... idk if the dev is going to put more efforts on the game.

reviews.review_title: A game only possible with VR!
reviews.review_description:
This is an ingenious rhythm game! You cannot enjoy this game on regular PC or console platforms. You have to hit the rhythm by making gestures with VR hand tracking. I think the addition of a "Copycat Mode," where you mimic hand shape notes, will appeal to even more users.

I personally found playing in "Rock-Paper-Scissors Mode," like in this video https://youtube.com/shorts/s1DkLg3P7to?si=hY2KaB6stAdUbXha to be more enjoyable.

I truly hope this game becomes more widely known and loved by many gamers. Therefore, I wish for updates with more diverse rhythm note patterns and new songs. It would be absolutely fantastic if a user custom mode were released!

Developers, please don't give up! This game has strong potential for success :)

developer_response.body: Thanks for the comments! Really glad that you enjoyed the game!

reviews.review_description:
Why always can't hand tracking "Rock" ??
I always show rock but can't detect it. if detected right rock tracking will be red color, but always white color, why??  very disappoint..........................

Update：All fixed, very amazing game, please have non stop mode to play

developer_response.body: Glad we were able to help solve the problem , Thank you for the review and great suggestion!  Note: for those running into  similar hand tracking problem, please make sure you upgrade to the newest version of the game (0.8.53 or newer).

reviews.review_title: The future is Beat saber rival
reviews.review_description:
Full body exercise for hands, eyes and brain.

Hope to add classical soft music

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the review! Guess you liked the Bach Invention 13 piano piece? Will definitely look into  more classical music !

reviews.review_description: I am a SUCKER for rhythm games & this one definitely is a great game. Rock paper scissors with a twist! This game is so different from anything else on the market & supports hand tracking ! Very original & a very unique idea. Keep up the great game! Looking forward to the development of this !

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review!  Please do let us know of any suggestions to make this game even better!

reviews.review_description:
This game is refreshing and fun. It's really like playing rock-paper-scissors. if the scissors fly to you, you have to use your rock, and if the rock flies to you, you have to use your paper, and you will get a point.

However, the game has had problems since updated it yesterday. It changed not to get point to win by rock-paper-scissors, but to get points if you make the same gesture. I hope this problem is solved and I enjoy the game again.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your review!  Sorry we were in the middle of an update.  We've added a "Copycat Mode", since many players requested for that.  Copycat mode is where the player copies the same gesture as the bubble icons.
We can turn off the "Copycat mode" toggle button at the Song menu, and enjoy the game with the classic RPS mode.  your preference will be saved for the next time you restart the app.  
We should be introducing different leaderboards for copycat and non-copycats.
Thanks, and keep popping those bubbles!

reviews.review_title: Kind of tricky at first but really fun!
reviews.review_description: Getting the correct rock paper scissors hand shape can be tricky in the beginning. But it's fun once I got a hang of it! Amazing Korea is my favorite song~
This is such a refreshing music rhythm game full of originality. I wish there could have more songs and more people get to see this game!
